name: First Cash Pawn
description_short: FirstCash is the leading international operator of pawn stores with 3,300+ locations across 29 U.S. states, the UK, and Latin America. They offer pawn loans secured by personal property and buy/sell merchandise.
description_long:
FirstCash, Inc. is headquartered in Fort Worth, Texas and operates as the leading international pawn store chain with over 3,300 retail locations spanning 29 U.S. states, the District of Columbia, the United Kingdom, and Latin America (Mexico, Guatemala, Colombia, and El Salvador). The company employs approximately 22,000 people and is listed on both the S&P MidCap 400 Index and Russell 2000 Index, indicating significant scale and public market recognition. FirstCash also operates AFF, a subsidiary providing lease-to-own and retail finance payment solutions through 15,000+ merchant partner locations nationwide.

FirstCash specializes in serving cash and credit-constrained consumers through two primary business lines: (1) retail pawn operations that buy and sell merchandise including jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, and musical instruments, and (2) non-recourse pawn loans secured by pledged personal property. They also offer gold/precious metal buying services, layaway plans with 10% down payment options, and retail sales of inventory. Their pawn loan structure means borrowers pledge personal items as collateral without personal liability beyond the collateral itself.

What distinguishes FirstCash is its massive geographic footprint and established market position as the largest pawn chain internationally. With 3,300+ stores, they offer unmatched convenience and store accessibility compared to independent pawn shops. Their integration into major stock indices and substantial workforce indicate operational sophistication and stability. The addition of the AFF subsidiary providing lease-to-own solutions through 15,000 merchant partners demonstrates diversification beyond traditional pawn lending.

However, consumers should understand that pawn loans are fundamentally collateral-based transactions with redemption requirements, not personal credit products. While pawn loans don't require credit checks and offer fast cash, failure to repay results in forfeiture of the pledged item. Interest rates and terms vary by location and state regulation. This service is best suited for consumers with valuable personal property who need immediate cash and can afford to reclaim their items, rather than those seeking credit-building or long-term financing solutions.
pros: 3,300+ locations across 29 U.S. states, UK, and Latin America provide exceptional convenience and accessibility
No credit check required for pawn loans—serves cash and credit-constrained consumers effectively
Non-recourse loans mean borrowers have no personal liability beyond the pledged collateral
Fast cash on-the-spot for gold, jewelry, and merchandise sales
Layaway service available with affordable 10% down payment option
Wide variety of merchandise purchased (jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, musical instruments, sporting goods)
Publicly-traded company (S&P MidCap 400, Russell 2000) indicates financial stability and regulatory oversight
cons: Forfeiture of pledged items if pawn loans aren't repaid—loss of personal property with sentimental or functional value
Pawn loans don't build credit history, offering no credit-building benefit for consumers
Interest rates and loan terms vary significantly by location and state regulations, creating unpredictable costs
Limited to consumers with valuable personal property to pledge; not accessible to those without collateral
Pawn transactions are short-term cash solutions, not suitable for consumers needing sustained financial assistance
best_for: Consumers with valuable personal property (jewelry, electronics, instruments) who need immediate cash and can afford to reclaim items
Credit-constrained individuals who cannot qualify for traditional personal loans but need quick access to funds
People seeking to sell gold, jewelry, or other merchandise for immediate cash without negotiating with private buyers
Shoppers looking for bargain merchandise on FirstCash's shelves or seeking layaway purchase options
diagnosis: FirstCash is best for consumers with valuable personal property who need immediate cash and can afford redemption, or those seeking to sell merchandise for fast payment. The critical caveat is that pawn loans result in permanent loss of items if not repaid—they are short-term collateral-based transactions, not credit products, and offer no credit-building benefit.
services: Pawn loans secured by personal property with non-recourse structure
Gold and precious metal buying with on-the-spot cash payment
Retail sales of merchandise (jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, musical instruments)
Layaway service with 10% down payment option
Store locator and inventory browsing online
Lease-to-own and retail finance solutions through AFF subsidiary (15,000+ merchant partners)
